generated_oml:
instance DS18S20_Thermometer1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (measuring range -55°C to 125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20_Thermometer2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (measuring range -55°C to 125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20_Thermometer3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (measuring range -55°C to 125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20_Thermometer1, DS18S20_Thermometer2, DS18S20_Thermometer3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model with 2 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model with 4 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for temperature data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy for non-linear least squares model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance CodeRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source code repository for digital twin software"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePrediction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring, ControlDecision
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimation
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through model-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetection
]

instance TemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from calibrated models"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current system state for safety and performance monitoring"
]

instance StateEstimation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated operational state of thermal incubator"
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies in thermal incubator system"
]

instance ControlDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision to control heatbed and fan to maintain desired temperature within bounds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with volume 0.03 m³"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component, DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm and 4A current requirement"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component, DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PowerControlPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for power control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4Controller, PowerControlPCB, PowerSupply, DS18S20_Thermometer1, DS18S20_Thermometer2, DS18S20_Thermometer3
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the controller (via RabbitMQ) to the low-level driver to actuate the heatbed and fan, with safe protocol enforced for device safety."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver for hardware interaction, controller for logic execution, and simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT and DT components as shown in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, integrating real-time sensor data from the deployed physical system for continuous monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments and calibration against real data; residual error minimized using non-linear least squares; Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) tested via sensor placement experiments."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for communication between components; 1-Wire bus for sensor connections; MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation in control signals."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all software components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, though specific cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols are not detailed in the document."
]
